{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/114161501?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/0xrdi/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/0xrdi/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/0xrdi/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/0xrdi/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/0xrdi", "id": 114161501, "login": "0xrdi", "node_id": "U_kgDOBs33XQ", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/0xrdi/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/0xrdi/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/0xrdi/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/0xrdi/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/0xrdi/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/0xrdi", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-55483", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 4.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:L/UI:N/VC:N/VI:H/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N/E:U"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-862", "name": "Missing Authorization"}], "description": "### Impact
The `store()` method in both the web and API `UsersController` only strips the superuser permission when a non-superuser creates a user. It does not strip the admin permission. This allows any authenticated user with the `users.create` permission to create a new user with full admin privileges.

The `users.create permission`  may commonly be delegated to HR staff, department leads, or similar roles.

### Patches
Patched in [aea3877718](https://github.com/grokability/snipe-it/commit/aea3877718158cc2a10c2dde4597b1f439f5f6cb)", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-hf68-g98v-wp9g", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-23T23:06:18Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-hf68-g98v-wp9g", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-hf68-g98v-wp9g"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-55483"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-23T23:06:18Z", "references": ["https://github.com/grokability/snipe-it/security/advisories/GHSA-hf68-g98v-wp9g", "https://github.com/grokability/snipe-it/commit/aea3877718158cc2a10c2dde4597b1f439f5f6cb", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-hf68-g98v-wp9g"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/grokability/snipe-it/security-advisories/GHSA-hf68-g98v-wp9g", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/grokability/snipe-it", "summary": "Snipe-IT Vulnerable to Privilege Escalation via Missing admin Permission Check in User Creation", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-23T23:06:19Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-hf68-g98v-wp9g", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "8.6.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "snipe/snipe-it"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 8.6.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Snipe-IT Vulnerable to Privilege Escalation via Missing admin Permission Check in User Creation
